title: Team VBAP: A Kaggle Challenge
text:
Project Description
This project is part of the DSA Major capstone which server to simulate a proper job experience. This included things like utilizing SCRUM and AGILE as well as working directly with a client. The goal we were assigned was to sign up for a competition on Kaggle and compete to reach at least the top half of the leaderboard. We ended up competiting on a competition entitled Hedge Fund - Time Series Forecasting which was meant to utilize Time Series Forecasting models and machine learning to predict data on a test set.
